headline: Humana Just Ripped 48% in a Month. Is It Outperforming Other Healthcare Stocks Like UnitedHealth and Cigna?
summary: Shares of Humana (NYSE:HUM) are trading near $303 at midday Monday, slightly lower on the session after a flat open. The one-month picture, however, tells a very different story. Humana stock is up 48% over the past month, dwarfing peers in the managed care complex. That run has put Humana well ahead of UnitedHealth Group ... Humana Just Ripped 48% in a Month. headline: Warren Buffet’s Berkshire sells rebounding healthcare stock
summary: UnitedHealth's stock collapsed more than 50% in the first half of 2025. Berkshire Hathaway stepped in at the lows. The stock then rebounded 45% in nine months. headline: One Lane Closed. The Whole Rate Picture Changed
summary: One shipping lane controls roughly 20 percent of the world's oil supply. Right now, it's closed. And in the space of five trading days, that single fact has moved oil to $105 a barrel, pushed Treasury yields to their highest point in roughly a year, and resurrected a rate hike scenario that nobody was pricing a week ago. Welcome to Monday.
